ideas.name: Competitive Intelligence
ideas.desc: AI-powered competitive intelligence for SaaS market landscape analysis, feature comparisons, pricing analysis, and threat assessments. Monitors competitor releases, G2/Gartner reviews, and job postings for strategic signals.

ideas.name: Customer Onboarding
ideas.desc: Tracks SaaS customer onboarding status, milestone completion, feature adoption metrics, and risk flags. Guides new customers through setup, data import, training modules, and time-to-value milestones.

ideas.name: License Renewal & Expansion
ideas.desc: Manages SaaS license renewal pipelines, expansion opportunities, churn risk analysis, and revenue impact projections. Monitors usage patterns and contract timelines to predict renewal risk and draft proposals.

ideas.name: Product Feedback Synthesizer
ideas.desc: Aggregates customer feedback, feature requests, sentiment analysis, and roadmap impact assessments for product teams. Clusters themes from support tickets, NPS surveys, app reviews, and sales calls.

ideas.name: Support Ticket Resolution
ideas.desc: Intelligent ticket triage, knowledge base resolution search, escalation routing, and SLA compliance dashboards. Auto-resolves common tickets and escalates complex issues with full diagnostic context.
